title: cytisus supinus var. calcareus
intro: Cytisus supinus var. calcareus, also known as Kidney Vetch or Calcareous Kidney Vetch, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and astringent effects. The health benefits of Cytisus supinus var. calcareus are attributed to its ability to support kidney and urinary health, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. In herbal preparations, Cytisus supinus var. calcareus is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions with other medications.
